---
# EXECUTION-SPEC Frontmatter
# Generated by build-pipeline for FIB-E2E-001

prd: FIB-E2E-001
prd_title: "E2E Test Validation Gap Remediation"
service: TestInfrastructure
mvp_phase: 0  # Horizontal — quality infrastructure

# Intake Authority Chain
fib_h: docs/issues/production-readiness/e2e/FIB-H-E2E-001-e2e-test-validation-gap-remediation.md
fib_s: docs/issues/production-readiness/e2e/FIB-S-E2E-001-e2e-test-validation-gap-remediation.json

workstreams:
  WS1:
    name: Quick Wins — Fixture Bugs
    description: |
      Fix fixture factories missing ADR-043 company creation, ADR-024 app_metadata
      stamping, and non-canonical auth patterns. Four root causes:
      RC-1: visit-continuation.spec.ts missing company insert before casino
      RC-2: test-data.ts missing app_metadata in admin.createUser() and updateUserById()
      RC-3: measurement-reports.spec.ts uses [name='email'] instead of #email
      RC-3.5: admin-settings.spec.ts uses localStorage auth at /signin instead of form login
    executor: e2e-testing
    executor_type: skill
    traces_to: [CAP-1, OUT-1, OUT-3, RULE-2, STEP-1, STEP-2, STEP-3]
    depends_on: []
    outputs:
      - e2e/workflows/visit-continuation.spec.ts
      - e2e/fixtures/test-data.ts
      - e2e/measurement-reports.spec.ts
      - e2e/workflows/admin-settings.spec.ts
    gate: test-pass
    estimated_complexity: medium
    implementation_hints:
      - "visit-continuation.spec.ts line 66: Add company insert before casino. Follow admin-helpers.ts lines 45-54 pattern."
      - "visit-continuation.spec.ts line 90: Add app_metadata to admin.createUser(). Add updateUserById() after staff creation (line 120). Follow rating-slip-fixtures.ts lines 108-158 pattern."
      - "test-data.ts line 86: Add app_metadata: { casino_id: casino.id, staff_role: 'admin' } to admin.createUser(). Add updateUserById() with staff_id after staff creation (line 117)."
      - "measurement-reports.spec.ts: Replace inline login (lines 16-24) with authenticateAndNavigate from e2e/fixtures/auth.ts. Remove seed data dependency."
      - "admin-settings.spec.ts: Replace all 3 beforeEach blocks (lines 44-51, 135-139, 159-163) using localStorage.setItem at /signin with authenticateAndNavigate from e2e/fixtures/auth.ts."
      - "admin-settings.spec.ts needs its own fixture with casino_settings — keep the existing beforeAll but fix the auth."
    patterns:
      - "ADR-043 company-first creation: company → casino → staff"
      - "ADR-024 app_metadata stamping: createUser({ app_metadata: { casino_id, staff_role } }) + updateUserById({ app_metadata: { casino_id, staff_id, staff_role } })"
      - "Canonical auth: authenticateAndNavigate from e2e/fixtures/auth.ts (Mode B)"
      - "Gold standard fixture: e2e/fixtures/admin-helpers.ts (already correct)"

  WS2:
    name: Route Drift — Admin Alerts
    description: |
      Fix admin alerts test failures. Evidence investigation reveals:
      - /admin/alerts redirects to /admin/anomaly-detection/alerts
      - Page heading is "Alerts" rendered as <h3> in alerts-page-client.tsx:98-103
      - FIB-S triage claimed heading changed to "Statistical Anomaly Detection" — code review shows this is WRONG, heading is still "Alerts"
      - The getByRole('heading', { name: 'Alerts' }) selector SHOULD match the h3
      - Actual failure is likely timing: redirect latency + networkidle wait on /admin/alerts before content renders
      RC-4: Redirect timing, not text mismatch. Fix URL to skip redirect.
    executor: e2e-testing
    executor_type: skill
    traces_to: [CAP-2, OUT-1, STEP-1, STEP-2, STEP-3]
    depends_on: []
    outputs:
      - e2e/workflows/admin-alerts.spec.ts
      - e2e/fixtures/admin-helpers.ts
    gate: test-pass
    estimated_complexity: low
    implementation_hints:
      - "ADMIN_URLS.alerts in admin-helpers.ts:157 → change '/admin/alerts' to '/admin/anomaly-detection/alerts' (skip redirect, page renders immediately)"
      - "admin-alerts.spec.ts line 38: heading assertion getByRole('heading', { name: 'Alerts' }) should work once redirect is eliminated — h3 contains 'Alerts'"
      - "If heading still fails after URL fix, the h3 has class 'uppercase' — check if Playwright name matching is case-sensitive against rendered uppercase text"
    patterns:
      - "Eliminate redirect latency by navigating directly to final URL"

  WS3:
    name: RLS Context for DB Triggers
    description: |
      Fix createTestTransaction() and createTestMtlEntry() which fail because
      DB triggers require RLS context (app.casino_id, app.actor_id) even when
      using service-role client for inserts.
      RC-5: createTestTransaction() in rating-slip-fixtures.ts triggers Finance-to-MTL bridge
      RC-6: createTestMtlEntry() in mtl-fixtures.ts triggers require context
    executor: e2e-testing
    executor_type: skill
    traces_to: [CAP-3, OUT-1, OUT-3, RULE-2, STEP-1, STEP-2, STEP-3]
    depends_on: [WS1]
    outputs:
      - e2e/fixtures/rating-slip-fixtures.ts
      - e2e/fixtures/mtl-fixtures.ts
    gate: test-pass
    estimated_complexity: medium
    implementation_hints:
      - "rating-slip-fixtures.ts line 368-401: createTestTransaction() uses service-role client. Triggers need app.casino_id/app.actor_id."
      - "mtl-fixtures.ts line 410-453: createTestMtlEntry() same issue."
      - "Fix pattern A: Call supabase.rpc('set_rls_context_internal', { p_casino_id, p_actor_id }) before the insert (service-role only)."
      - "Fix pattern B: Use Mode C authenticated client for the insert instead of service-role."
      - "set_rls_context_internal is available to service_role — check if it exists: grep for it in migrations."
      - "Both fixtures already have authToken and staffId in the scenario — can use authenticated client."
    patterns:
      - "Service-role + RLS context: rpc('set_rls_context_internal') before insert"
      - "Alternative: Mode C authenticated client with Bearer token"
      - "Verify trigger dependencies by checking migration files for trigger functions"

  WS4:
    name: Pit Page Selector — Add data-testid
    description: |
      RESOLVED via pre-execution investigation. data-testid="table-grid" does NOT exist
      anywhere in the codebase. The table layout container is at:
        components/pit-panels/tables-panel.tsx line 237
      Component chain: page.tsx → PitPanelsDashboardLayout → PitPanelsClient → PanelContainer → TablesPanel → TableLayoutTerminal
      No shift or casino_settings guard — page only requires auth + gaming_table rows in casino.
      RC-7: Missing data-testid attribute. Fix: add data-testid="table-grid" to container div.
      RULE-4 compliant (adding testid only, no behavioral change).
    executor: e2e-testing
    executor_type: skill
    traces_to: [CAP-4, OUT-1, RULE-4, STEP-1, STEP-2, STEP-3]
    depends_on: [WS3]
    outputs:
      - components/pit-panels/tables-panel.tsx
      - e2e/workflows/rating-slip-modal.spec.ts
      - e2e/workflows/move-player.spec.ts
      - e2e/mtl-threshold-notifications.spec.ts
      - e2e/workflows/loyalty-accrual-lifecycle.spec.ts
    gate: test-pass
    estimated_complexity: medium
    implementation_hints:
      - "tables-panel.tsx line 237: Add data-testid='table-grid' to the outer div: <div data-testid='table-grid' className='flex-1 relative overflow-hidden ...'>"
      - "Fixture requirement: casino must have at least one gaming_table row (existing fixtures already create this)."
      - "PitPanelsClient auto-selects first table (line 218-227) — no manual table selection needed."
      - "Verify with playwright-cli that the testid appears after the fix and that TablesPanel renders the table layout."
    patterns:
      - "RULE-4: Only add data-testid attribute, no behavioral changes"

  WS5:
    name: Assertion Drift — Locked Truth Targets
    description: |
      All truth targets verified via pre-execution code review. This is purely
      implementation — no discovery phase needed. 8 root causes with concrete fixes:
      RC-8:  CSV row text is "{n} rows detected" (toLocaleString). Source: step-file-selection.tsx:165
      RC-9:  Setup wizard titles confirmed: Casino Basics, Game Settings, Create Tables, Target Bankroll (Par), Review & Complete. Source: setup-wizard.tsx:34-40 STEP_LABELS
      RC-10: CardTitle renders as <div> not <h*>. Source: components/ui/card.tsx:31-39 (ComponentProps<'div'>). getByRole('heading') → getByText()
      RC-11: Unauthenticated redirect goes to /signin NOT /auth/login. Source: app/(protected)/layout.tsx:25, app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx:20. /signin is a real page at app/(marketing)/signin/page.tsx
      RC-12: /players/[id]/timeline route EXISTS, returns 308 to /players/[id]#timeline. Source: app/(dashboard)/players/[playerId]/timeline/route.ts. Test expects 308 — should pass as-is
      RC-13: /api/v1/shift-intelligence/alerts route EXISTS. Source: app/api/v1/shift-intelligence/alerts/route.ts. Spec must use Playwright request context + auth
      RC-14: loyalty-accrual close endpoint needs Authorization: Bearer <token> header
      RC-15: loyalty-accrual-lifecycle fixture/auth issues — likely resolved by WS3 RLS fixes
    executor: e2e-testing
    executor_type: skill
    traces_to: [CAP-5, OUT-1, STEP-1, STEP-2, STEP-3, STEP-4]
    depends_on: [WS3, WS4]
    outputs:
      - e2e/workflows/csv-player-import.spec.ts
      - e2e/workflows/csv-server-import.spec.ts
      - e2e/workflows/setup-wizard.spec.ts
      - e2e/workflows/loyalty-admin-catalog.spec.ts
      - e2e/workflows/shift-dashboard-v3-layout.spec.ts
      - e2e/workflows/player-360-navigation.spec.ts
      - e2e/workflows/player-360-panels.spec.ts
      - e2e/workflows/loyalty-accrual-lifecycle.spec.ts
      - e2e/api/shift-intelligence.spec.ts
      - e2e/api/loyalty-accrual.spec.ts
    gate: test-pass
    estimated_complexity: high
    truth_targets:
      - id: RC-8
        file: e2e/workflows/csv-player-import.spec.ts
        change: "Assertion text '5 rows detected' or '10 rows detected' must match toLocaleString() output from step-file-selection.tsx:165"
      - id: RC-9
        file: e2e/workflows/setup-wizard.spec.ts
        change: "Card title selector [data-slot='card-title'] text matches STEP_LABELS from setup-wizard.tsx:34-40. 'Game Settings' confirmed correct for step 1."
      - id: RC-10
        file: e2e/workflows/loyalty-admin-catalog.spec.ts
        change: "getByRole('heading', { name: 'Reward Catalog' }) → getByText('Reward Catalog') because CardTitle is <div> not <h*>"
      - id: RC-11
        file: e2e/workflows/shift-dashboard-v3-layout.spec.ts
        change: "Redirect assertion /\\/auth\\/login/ → /\\/signin/ because protected layout redirects to /signin"
      - id: RC-12
        file: e2e/workflows/player-360-navigation.spec.ts
        change: "Timeline 308 redirect confirmed working. If test fails, issue is auth/fixture, not route."
      - id: RC-13
        file: e2e/api/shift-intelligence.spec.ts
        change: "Replace raw fetch() with Playwright request context. Route /api/v1/shift-intelligence/alerts confirmed. Add auth headers. Requires ENABLE_DEV_AUTH=true."
      - id: RC-14
        file: e2e/api/loyalty-accrual.spec.ts
        change: "Add Authorization: Bearer <scenario.authToken> to close endpoint request"
      - id: RC-15
        file: e2e/workflows/loyalty-accrual-lifecycle.spec.ts
        change: "Fixture + auth fixes from WS3 likely resolve this. Verify after WS3 gate passes."
    patterns:
      - "RULE-1: Only fix existing assertions, do not write new test scenarios"
      - "RULE-3 exemptions: shift-intelligence.spec.ts, loyalty-accrual.spec.ts, loyalty-accrual-lifecycle.spec.ts retain seed-data dependencies"

  WS6:
    name: CI Promotion — Advisory to Blocking
    description: |
      Update ci.yml e2e job: expand spec list from 2 files to full suite,
      add ENABLE_DEV_AUTH=true env var, then promote from advisory to blocking
      after 3 consecutive green CI runs.
      RC-16: CI only runs 2 specs with continue-on-error: true.
      Two-phase: (a) expand + keep advisory, (b) remove continue-on-error after stabilization.
    executor: qa-specialist
    executor_type: skill
    traces_to: [CAP-6, OUT-5, RULE-5, STEP-5, STEP-6]
    depends_on: [WS1, WS2, WS3, WS4, WS5]
    outputs:
      - .github/workflows/ci.yml
    gate: build
    estimated_complexity: low
    implementation_hints:
      - "Phase A (ship with this PR): Change line 103 from 2 specific files to 'npx playwright test' (full suite)."
      - "Phase A: Add ENABLE_DEV_AUTH: 'true' to env block (line 104-108)."
      - "Phase A: Keep continue-on-error: true for stabilization."
      - "Phase B (follow-up PR after 3 green runs): Remove continue-on-error: true."
      - "Include ADR-044 §12 change-control disclosure in PR description."
    ci_boot_contract: |
      Playwright handles dev server startup via existing webServer config in playwright.config.ts:53-56:
        webServer: { command: 'npm run dev', url: 'http://localhost:3000', reuseExistingServer: !process.env.CI }
      In CI (process.env.CI=true), reuseExistingServer is false — Playwright auto-starts 'npm run dev' and waits
      for http://localhost:3000 health check before running tests. No additional server start step in ci.yml.
      Required env vars for dev server: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY (already set).
      Required env var for shift-intelligence: ENABLE_DEV_AUTH=true (add to env block).
    patterns:
      - "ADR-044 §12 disclosure required for CI scope changes"
      - "RULE-5: Advisory first, blocking only after stabilization"

execution_phases:
  - name: Phase 1 — Fixture Bugs + Route Drift
    parallel: [WS1, WS2]
    gates: [test-pass]

  - name: Phase 2 — RLS Context
    parallel: [WS3]
    gates: [test-pass]

  - name: Phase 3 — Pit Selectors
    parallel: [WS4]
    gates: [test-pass]

  - name: Phase 4 — Assertion Drift
    parallel: [WS5]
    gates: [test-pass]

  - name: Phase 5 — CI Promotion
    parallel: [WS6]
    gates: [build]

gates:
  e2e-ws1-validation:
    command: "npx playwright test e2e/workflows/visit-continuation.spec.ts e2e/workflows/admin-settings.spec.ts e2e/measurement-reports.spec.ts --reporter=list"
    success_criteria: "All tests in these 3 spec files pass, exit 0"

  e2e-ws2-validation:
    command: "npx playwright test e2e/workflows/admin-alerts.spec.ts --reporter=list"
    success_criteria: "All tests pass, exit 0"

  e2e-ws3-validation:
    command: "npx playwright test e2e/mtl-threshold-notifications.spec.ts e2e/workflows/rating-slip-modal.spec.ts --reporter=list"
    success_criteria: "All tests pass, exit 0"

  e2e-ws4-validation:
    command: "npx playwright test e2e/workflows/rating-slip-modal.spec.ts e2e/workflows/move-player.spec.ts --reporter=list"
    success_criteria: "All tests pass, exit 0"

  e2e-ws5-validation:
    command: "npx playwright test e2e/workflows/csv-player-import.spec.ts e2e/workflows/csv-server-import.spec.ts e2e/workflows/setup-wizard.spec.ts e2e/workflows/loyalty-admin-catalog.spec.ts e2e/workflows/shift-dashboard-v3-layout.spec.ts e2e/workflows/player-360-navigation.spec.ts e2e/workflows/player-360-panels.spec.ts e2e/workflows/loyalty-accrual-lifecycle.spec.ts e2e/api/shift-intelligence.spec.ts e2e/api/loyalty-accrual.spec.ts --reporter=list"
    success_criteria: "All tests pass, exit 0"

  ci-e2e-promotion:
    command: "Manual verification: 3 consecutive green CI runs with full spec list in advisory mode"
    success_criteria: "3 green runs confirmed, then continue-on-error removed in follow-up PR"

  e2e-full-suite:
    command: "npx playwright test --reporter=list"
    success_criteria: "140 implemented tests pass, 13 stubs skipped, exit 0"

# Open-Question Decisions — ALL RESOLVED via pre-execution investigation
decisions:
  - decision_id: DEC-001
    resolves_open_question: "Exact data-testid selector names on pit page components"
    decision_statement: "Add data-testid='table-grid' to the container div at components/pit-panels/tables-panel.tsx line 237."
    rationale: "Verified: attribute does not exist anywhere in codebase. Component chain traced from page.tsx through PitPanelsDashboardLayout → PitPanelsClient → PanelContainer → TablesPanel. The div at line 237 wraps TableLayoutTerminal."
    impact_on_scope: none
    verification: cited

  - decision_id: DEC-002
    resolves_open_question: "Exact API route paths for shift-intelligence alerts"
    decision_statement: "Route is /api/v1/shift-intelligence/alerts (GET). Confirmed at app/api/v1/shift-intelligence/alerts/route.ts."
    rationale: "File exists and exports GET handler. Query params: gaming_day (required), status (optional)."
    impact_on_scope: none
    verification: cited

  - decision_id: DEC-003
    resolves_open_question: "Exact UI text for CSV import row detection feedback"
    decision_statement: "Text pattern is '{n} rows detected' using parsedRowCount.toLocaleString(). Source: components/player-import/step-file-selection.tsx line 165."
    rationale: "Verified in source: <p className='text-muted-foreground mt-2 text-xs'>{parsedRowCount.toLocaleString()} rows detected</p>"
    impact_on_scope: none
    verification: cited

  - decision_id: DEC-004
    resolves_open_question: "Whether pit page requires active shift or casino_settings to render table grid"
    decision_statement: "No shift or casino_settings required. Page only requires authenticated user + gaming_table rows in casino. Auto-selects first table."
    rationale: "Verified: PitPanelsClient (line 218-227) auto-selects first table from fetchDashboardTables() RPC. No shift guard in the component chain. Existing fixtures create gaming_table rows."
    impact_on_scope: none
    verification: cited

risks:
  - risk: "WS4 investigation may reveal pit page requires additional fixture data beyond what current factories create"
    mitigation: "Expand fixture factory if needed. If component structure fundamentally changed, update test selectors. Capped by RULE-1 (no new test scenarios)."

  - risk: "Cascade failures (68 blocked) may expose new independent failures beyond 5 root cause categories"
    mitigation: "Per FIB-H Section K, if >10 cascade-unblocked tests reveal new independent failures, trigger FIB amendment."

  - risk: "RLS context fixes in WS3 may require understanding undocumented trigger behavior"
    mitigation: "Use set_rls_context_internal() RPC for service-role context injection. Verify trigger functions exist in migrations."

  - risk: "Seed-data-dependent specs may fail if seed data changes"
    mitigation: "Per RULE-3, 3 exempted specs retain seed-data dependencies. Update hardcoded IDs if seed data changed."

external_dependencies: []
---

# EXECUTION-SPEC: FIB-E2E-001 — E2E Test Validation Gap Remediation

## Overview

153 Playwright E2E test cases exist across 22 spec files but have never been validated against a running application. Triage shows 22 passing, 50 failing, 68 blocked by cascade, and 13 stubs. This EXEC-SPEC remediates the 140 implemented tests (excluding 13 stubs) by fixing 5 root cause categories: fixture bugs, route drift, RLS context for triggers, pit page selector drift, and assertion drift. After all tests pass, the CI e2e job is promoted from advisory (2 specs) to full-suite blocking.

This is test infrastructure remediation, not feature development. The only production code changes are adding `data-testid` attributes where necessary (RULE-4).

## Scope

- **In Scope**: Fix 140 existing test cases across 6 workstreams. Promote CI e2e job to full suite.
- **Out of Scope**: Writing new tests, implementing stubs, fixture architecture redesign, POM refactor, visual regression, cross-browser testing, Playwright upgrade.
- **Seed data exemptions**: `shift-intelligence.spec.ts`, `loyalty-accrual.spec.ts`, `loyalty-accrual-lifecycle.spec.ts` retain seed-data dependencies per RULE-3.

## Architecture Context

No architectural changes. All work is within `e2e/` test infrastructure and `.github/workflows/ci.yml`. The single production touchpoint is adding `data-testid` attributes to pit page components (WS4, RULE-4 constrained).

Key patterns referenced:
- ADR-043: Company-first creation (company_id NOT NULL on casino)
- ADR-024: app_metadata stamping (casino_id, staff_id, staff_role)
- ADR-015: RLS context injection for triggers
- QA-006: E2E testing standard (auth modes, verification taxonomy)

## Workstream Details

### WS1: Quick Wins — Fixture Bugs (22 tests unblocked)

**Purpose**: Fix the most common fixture failures that cascade-block downstream tests.

**Root Causes (verified via code review)**:

1. **RC-1** — `visit-continuation.spec.ts:66`: Casino insert without company creation violates ADR-043 NOT NULL constraint on `company_id`.
   - Fix: Add company insert before casino (follow `admin-helpers.ts:45-54` pattern)

2. **RC-2** — `test-data.ts:86`: `admin.createUser()` missing `app_metadata`. No `updateUserById()` with `staff_id` after staff creation.
   - Fix: Add `app_metadata: { casino_id, staff_role }` to `createUser()`. Add `updateUserById()` after staff insert (follow `rating-slip-fixtures.ts:108-158` pattern)

3. **RC-3** — `measurement-reports.spec.ts:18-19`: Uses `[name="email"]` selector instead of `#email`. Uses seed data credentials.
   - Fix: Replace inline login with `authenticateAndNavigate()` from `e2e/fixtures/auth.ts`

4. **RC-3.5** — `admin-settings.spec.ts:44-51`: Uses `localStorage.setItem('supabase.auth.token', ...)` at `/signin` instead of form login.
   - Fix: Replace all 3 `beforeEach` blocks with `authenticateAndNavigate()` from `e2e/fixtures/auth.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] visit-continuation fixture creates company before casino
- [ ] test-data.ts stamps app_metadata with casino_id, staff_id, staff_role
- [ ] measurement-reports uses canonical auth from auth.ts
- [ ] admin-settings uses canonical auth from auth.ts (all 3 describe blocks)
- [ ] `npx playwright test` for these 3 spec files passes

### WS2: Route Drift — Admin Alerts (3 tests unblocked)

**Purpose**: Fix admin alerts test by eliminating redirect latency.

**Root Cause (corrected from triage)**:
- **RC-4** — FIB-S triage stated heading changed to "Statistical Anomaly Detection". Code review disproves this: `alerts-page-client.tsx:98-103` renders `<h3>Alerts</h3>`. The actual failure is timing: `/admin/alerts` redirects to `/admin/anomaly-detection/alerts`, and tests timeout waiting for content during the redirect hop.

**Truth Targets**:
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `admin-helpers.ts:157` | `ADMIN_URLS.alerts`: `'/admin/alerts'` → `'/admin/anomaly-detection/alerts'` |
| `admin-alerts.spec.ts:38` | `getByRole('heading', { name: 'Alerts' })` — keep as-is (h3 text IS "Alerts") |

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] `ADMIN_URLS.alerts` = `'/admin/anomaly-detection/alerts'` (skip redirect)
- [ ] `getByRole('heading', { name: 'Alerts' })` passes (heading confirmed as h3 "Alerts")
- [ ] `npx playwright test e2e/workflows/admin-alerts.spec.ts` exits 0

### WS3: RLS Context for DB Triggers (11 tests unblocked)

**Purpose**: Fix `createTestTransaction()` and `createTestMtlEntry()` which fail because DB triggers require RLS context even from service-role inserts.

**Root Causes (verified)**:
- **RC-5** — `rating-slip-fixtures.ts:368-401`: `createTestTransaction()` inserts via service-role but triggers need `app.casino_id`/`app.actor_id`.
- **RC-6** — `mtl-fixtures.ts:410-453`: `createTestMtlEntry()` same pattern.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Both fixture functions set RLS context before insert (via `set_rls_context_internal` RPC or Mode C client)
- [ ] `npx playwright test e2e/mtl-threshold-notifications.spec.ts e2e/workflows/rating-slip-modal.spec.ts` passes

### WS4: Pit Page Selector — Add data-testid (28 tests unblocked)

**Purpose**: Add missing `data-testid="table-grid"` attribute to pit page table container.

**Root Cause (resolved via pre-execution investigation)**:
- **RC-7** — `data-testid="table-grid"` does not exist in the codebase. The table layout container is at `components/pit-panels/tables-panel.tsx:237`. No shift guard, no casino_settings guard — page renders when auth + gaming_table rows exist. RULE-4 compliant (testid only).

**Truth Targets**:
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `components/pit-panels/tables-panel.tsx:237` | Add `data-testid="table-grid"` to outer container `<div>` |

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] `data-testid="table-grid"` present on tables-panel.tsx container div
- [ ] No behavioral changes to production code (RULE-4)
- [ ] `npx playwright test e2e/workflows/rating-slip-modal.spec.ts e2e/workflows/move-player.spec.ts` exits 0

### WS5: Assertion Drift — Locked Truth Targets (20 tests unblocked)

**Purpose**: Apply concrete assertion fixes across 10 spec files. All truth targets verified via pre-execution code review.

**Truth Targets**:
| RC | File | Old | New | Evidence |
|----|------|-----|-----|----------|
| RC-8 | csv-player-import.spec.ts | `'5 rows detected'` (or similar) | Match `toLocaleString() + ' rows detected'` | step-file-selection.tsx:165 |
| RC-9 | setup-wizard.spec.ts | `'Game Settings'` card title | Keep as-is — confirmed in STEP_LABELS | setup-wizard.tsx:34-40 |
| RC-10 | loyalty-admin-catalog.spec.ts | `getByRole('heading', { name: 'Reward Catalog' })` | `getByText('Reward Catalog')` | card.tsx:31 — CardTitle is `<div>` |
| RC-11 | shift-dashboard-v3-layout.spec.ts | `expect(page).toHaveURL(/\/auth\/login/)` | `expect(page).toHaveURL(/\/signin/)` | (protected)/layout.tsx:25 |
| RC-12 | player-360-navigation.spec.ts | 308 redirect assertion | Keep as-is — route confirmed | players/[playerId]/timeline/route.ts |
| RC-13 | shift-intelligence.spec.ts | Raw `fetch()` with hardcoded BASE_URL | Playwright `request` context + auth headers | alerts/route.ts exists |
| RC-14 | loyalty-accrual.spec.ts | Close request missing auth | Add `Authorization: Bearer <token>` | — |
| RC-15 | loyalty-accrual-lifecycle.spec.ts | Fixture + auth failures | Likely resolved by WS3 RLS fixes | Verify after WS3 gate |

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] RC-10: `getByRole('heading', ...)` → `getByText('Reward Catalog')` in loyalty-admin-catalog.spec.ts
- [ ] RC-11: Redirect regex `/\/auth\/login/` → `/\/signin/` in shift-dashboard-v3-layout.spec.ts
- [ ] RC-13: shift-intelligence.spec.ts uses Playwright `request` context with auth headers (not raw `fetch()`)
- [ ] RC-14: loyalty-accrual.spec.ts close request includes `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
- [ ] All 10 spec files pass individually

### WS6: CI Promotion — Advisory to Blocking (0 tests, CI config)

**Purpose**: Expand CI e2e job to run full suite and promote from advisory to blocking.

**CI Boot Contract**: Playwright's existing `webServer` config (`playwright.config.ts:53-56`) auto-starts `npm run dev` and waits for `http://localhost:3000` health-check in CI. No additional server start step in ci.yml.

**Two-phase approach**:
- **Phase A** (this PR): Expand spec list to `npx playwright test`, add `ENABLE_DEV_AUTH`, keep `continue-on-error: true`
- **Phase B** (follow-up PR after 3 green runs): Remove `continue-on-error: true`

**Truth Targets**:
| File | Line | Old | New |
|------|------|-----|-----|
| ci.yml | 103 | `npx playwright test e2e/workflows/player-exclusion.spec.ts e2e/api/player-exclusion-enforcement.spec.ts` | `npx playwright test` |
| ci.yml | env block | (missing) | `ENABLE_DEV_AUTH: 'true'` |
| ci.yml | 80 | `continue-on-error: true` | Keep for Phase A; remove in Phase B |

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] ci.yml line 103: `npx playwright test` (full suite, no file list)
- [ ] ci.yml env block: `ENABLE_DEV_AUTH: 'true'` present
- [ ] ci.yml: `continue-on-error: true` retained for Phase A stabilization
- [ ] PR description includes ADR-044 §12 change-control disclosure
- [ ] Phase B triggered only after 3 consecutive green CI runs

## Definition of Done

- [ ] All 6 workstreams complete
- [ ] All workstream gates pass
- [ ] Full suite gate passes: `npx playwright test` exits 0 (140 pass, 13 skipped) — unless FIB-H Section K amendment threshold is triggered by >10 newly independent failures post-cascade-unblock, in which case pipeline pauses for FIB amendment before DoD
- [ ] CI e2e job expanded to full suite (advisory mode)
- [ ] No regressions in existing unit/integration tests
- [ ] PR includes ADR-044 §12 disclosure for CI changes

## Appendix A: Pre-Execution Evidence

Evidence gathered via codebase investigation before execution. All open questions from `governance.open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold` are now resolved with cited verification.

### A.1 Pit Page DOM Structure (DEC-001)

```
Component chain:
  app/(dashboard)/pit/page.tsx
    → components/pit-panels/pit-panels-dashboard-layout.tsx
      → components/pit-panels/pit-panels-client.tsx
        → components/pit-panels/panel-container.tsx
          → components/pit-panels/tables-panel.tsx (line 237 = target)
            → components/pit-panels/table-layout-terminal.tsx

Target element (tables-panel.tsx:237):
  <div className="flex-1 relative overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-border/40 ...">
    <!-- Add data-testid="table-grid" here -->
    <TableLayoutTerminal ... />
  </div>

Rendering guards: auth only. No shift/casino_settings required.
Auto-selects first table (pit-panels-client.tsx:218-227).
```

### A.2 Admin Alerts Heading (WS2 Triage Correction)

```
Triage claim:  Heading changed to "Statistical Anomaly Detection"
Actual code:   alerts-page-client.tsx:98-103 → <h3>Alerts</h3> (uppercase via CSS)
Routing:       /admin/alerts → redirect → /admin/anomaly-detection/alerts
Root cause:    Redirect latency, not text mismatch
Fix:           Point ADMIN_URLS.alerts directly to /admin/anomaly-detection/alerts
```

### A.3 Shift Dashboard Redirect (RC-11)

```
Test expects:  /\/auth\/login/
Actual code:   app/(protected)/layout.tsx:25 → redirect('/signin')
               app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx:20 → redirect('/signin')
/signin page:  app/(marketing)/signin/page.tsx → renders <LoginForm />
Fix:           Update test regex to /\/signin/
```

### A.4 Loyalty Catalog CardTitle Semantics (RC-10)

```
components/ui/card.tsx:31-39:
  function CardTitle({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<'div'>) {
    return <div data-slot="card-title" ... />
  }

Element:       <div> (NOT <h1>..<h6>)
ARIA role:     none (not a heading)
Test selector: getByRole('heading', { name: 'Reward Catalog' }) → WILL FAIL
Fix:           getByText('Reward Catalog')
```

### A.5 CSV Import Row Text (RC-8)

```
components/player-import/step-file-selection.tsx:165:
  <p className="text-muted-foreground mt-2 text-xs">
    {parsedRowCount.toLocaleString()} rows detected
  </p>

Pattern: "{n} rows detected" with locale-aware number formatting
Example: "5 rows detected", "1,000 rows detected"
```

```
app/(onboarding)/setup/setup-wizard.tsx:34-40 STEP_LABELS:
  Step 0: "Casino Basics"
  Step 1: "Game Settings"       ← test expects this, confirmed correct
  Step 2: "Create Tables"
  Step 3: "Target Bankroll (Par)"
  Step 4: "Review & Complete"
```

```
Confirmed routes at app/api/v1/shift-intelligence/:
  GET  /api/v1/shift-intelligence/alerts          (gaming_day, status params)
  GET  /api/v1/shift-intelligence/anomaly-alerts   (window_start, window_end)
  POST /api/v1/shift-intelligence/acknowledge-alert
```

### A.8 Player-360 Timeline Route (RC-12)

```
app/(dashboard)/players/[playerId]/timeline/route.ts:
  GET → 308 Permanent Redirect → /players/{playerId}#timeline
  Preserves query params. Test expects 308 — confirmed correct.
```

### A.9 CI Boot Contract (WS6)

```
playwright.config.ts:53-56:
  webServer: {
    command: 'npm run dev',
    url: 'http://localhost:3000',
    reuseExistingServer: !process.env.CI,    // false in CI → auto-starts
  }

No additional server start step needed in ci.yml.
Playwright auto-starts dev server and waits for health check.
```
